limitations: Local loopback, one machine, warm browser cache, no network/CPU throttling; this is not a production SLO.
Playwright action and locator scheduling overhead is included in user-triggered interaction samples.
Drawer measurement stores the slower result from each paired open/close cycle; component timings are attached to the test report.
Route samples alternate two preserved client-side destinations after warm-up and do not model cold external navigation.
Future comparisons are valid only with the same build mode, browser, fixture, viewport, worker count, and method.

measurements.description: Full local navigation start until the hydrated Core shell is visible and theme/direction effects are applied.
measurements.method: Warm-cache page.goto to /dashboard/apps plus visible .nx-app-root and html dir/data-theme readiness.

measurements.description: Slower visible-feedback result from each paired compact drawer open and scrim-close cycle.
measurements.method: Playwright click until the existing .open class appears/disappears; raw component timings are attached separately.

measurements.description: Profile trigger activation until the existing Account menu item is visible.
measurements.method: Playwright click plus visible menu-item locator; includes automation/action scheduling overhead.

measurements.description: Locale activation until html lang and direction match the selected existing control.
measurements.method: Alternating EN/Arabic control clicks with observable html lang/dir completion.

measurements.description: Theme activation until the existing html data-theme effect matches the next theme.
measurements.method: Alternating current theme toggle clicks with observable html data-theme completion.

measurements.description: Existing sidebar activation until the destination URL and main page canvas are ready.
measurements.method: Alternating warm client navigation between Product Hub and Billing using preserved sidebar links.
